race.description: Id26 Ladbrokes Inter Dom Pacing Consolation (G3)
race.comment: THE JANITOR NZ (12) has been the disappointment of the Inter Dominion series but he hasn't had the best of luck when working from some tricky draws. Has another tough barrier but has shown his class in pushing Leap To Fame a couple of times this year, most notably when a close second in the Miracle Mile. He'll win this if anywhere near that form. SPEAK THE TRUTH (6) was runner-up in last year's final and while he hasn't matched that form this year he did manage a solid third from a similar draw to this in round one. Expect him to be at his peak tonight. UBETCHA TIGERPIE (7) hasn't really fired through the series but his prior form was strong so he is capable of making an impact if things go his way from a wide draw. PATH TO GREATNESS (3) was a solid fourth to Leap To Fame last week and should get his chance from a favourable draw. ATTACHMENT (11) may need some luck from this draw but there was merit in his effort to place last week.
